construct_verdict_reason: All three items directly measure core dimensions of political interest and engagement: news consumption frequency, self-reported political interest, and perceived relevance of politics to daily life.

items.reason: Directly measures frequency of political news consumption, a key behavioral indicator of political engagement.
Directly measures self-reported interest in politics, a core attitudinal component of the construct.
Directly measures perceived relevance of politics to daily life, capturing the salience dimension of political engagement.
